name: MI Indoor Golf
address: 13134 W Star Dr, Shelby Township, MI 48315
about: MI Indoor Golf is a golf simulation venue that offers indoor golf experiences. The venue provides access to golf simulators for golfers to practice or play virtual rounds. While specific details about the technology, pricing, and atmosphere are limited due to website access restrictions, the venue appears to be a dedicated indoor golf facility.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to indoor golf simulation technology
Suitable for various skill levels and group types

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs or rent them at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available at the venue, outside food and drink may not be allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, playing 18 holes on a simulator takes about 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, MI Indoor Golf is kid-friendly and suitable for families.
